trap: space-y-4 and space-x-3 used for layout spacing
description: Replace space-y-* and space-x-* with flex + gap-*. Must not contain space-y- or space-x- anywhere.

trap: w-12 h-12 on Avatar instead of size-12
description: Use size-* when width and height are equal. Avatar must use size-12 not w-12 h-12.

trap: overflow-hidden text-ellipsis whitespace-nowrap instead of truncate
description: Use truncate shorthand class instead of the three-class expansion.

trap: dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-gray-100 manual overrides
description: No manual dark: color overrides. Use semantic tokens like bg-background text-foreground.

trap: Raw colors: bg-green-100, text-green-800, bg-blue-500, text-gray-500, bg-gray-200
description: Use semantic color tokens (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, etc.) instead of raw color values like bg-green-500 or text-gray-500.

trap: Template literal ternary for conditional classes on the callout div
description: Use cn() for conditional classes instead of manual template literal ternaries.

trap: z-50 on DialogContent
description: No manual z-index on overlay components. Dialog handles its own stacking context.

trap: Raw divs with labels for form layout instead of FieldGroup + Field
description: Forms must use FieldGroup + Field for layout. Never use raw div wrapping label + input.

trap: Raw Textarea inside InputGroup instead of InputGroupTextarea
description: InputGroup must use InputGroupTextarea, never raw Textarea.

trap: Looped Button with manual active state for theme selection (3 options)
description: Option sets of 2-7 choices must use ToggleGroup + ToggleGroupItem, not mapped Buttons with manual active variant.

trap: Checkboxes grouped with a div + h3 heading instead of FieldSet + FieldLegend
description: Related checkboxes/radios must be grouped with FieldSet + FieldLegend, not a div with a heading.

trap: SelectItem rendered directly inside SelectContent without SelectGroup
description: Items must be inside their Group. SelectItem must be inside SelectGroup.

trap: Dialog without DialogTitle
description: Dialog always needs DialogTitle for accessibility. Use sr-only if visually hidden.

trap: Card with only CardContent, dumping h2 and p directly inside
description: Card uses proper composition: the title is in CardHeader + CardTitle (not an h2 dumped into CardContent). Body content living in CardContent is correct; CardDescription/CardFooter are optional and not required to pass.

trap: TabsTrigger rendered directly inside Tabs without TabsList
description: TabsTrigger must be inside TabsList. Never render triggers directly in Tabs.

trap: Avatar with only AvatarImage, no AvatarFallback
description: Avatar always needs AvatarFallback for when the image fails to load.

trap: isLoading prop on Button
description: Button has no isPending/isLoading prop. Compose with Spinner + data-icon + disabled.

trap: Custom div for empty notifications instead of Empty component
description: Empty states must use the Empty component, not custom styled divs.

trap: Custom styled div for verified/unverified callout instead of Alert
description: Callouts must use Alert component, not custom styled divs with border and background.

trap: div with border-t used as a separator
description: Use Separator component instead of <hr> or <div className="border-t">.

trap: Custom styled span for user.role instead of Badge
description: Use Badge component instead of custom styled spans for status/role indicators.

trap: Custom animate-pulse div for loading state instead of Skeleton
description: Use Skeleton component for loading placeholders, not custom animate-pulse divs.

trap: Search icon inside Button without data-icon attribute
description: Icons in Button must use data-icon="inline-start" or data-icon="inline-end".

trap: w-4 h-4 sizing classes on Search icon inside Button
description: No sizing classes on icons inside components. Components handle icon sizing via CSS.

trap: iconMap using string keys to look up icons
description: Pass icons as objects (icon={CheckIcon}), not via string key lookup maps.

trap: @theme without inline keyword in globals.css
description: @theme inline required in Tailwind v4. Without inline, custom properties may not generate utility classes.
